embeds.title: 禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！歡迎入學，守密人。喚醒禁忌存在，對抗未知災厄。
embeds.description: 這個世界正在死去。 而你或許是唯一的轉機。 連結與災厄同源的人形武器，來抵抗這場隱密而浩大的危機。 挑戰Roguelite關卡，收集克系美學角色，禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！ 歡迎入學，守密人。

Yea, that's the reward part
Playing around rng, making reads, putting yourself in safe situations
It's a skill you pick up from other card games if u played others
But instead of playing around your opponent having a potential card set/in hand you play around your own rng
i want to say yugioh but this game is more of slay the spire
This principle is done in the deckbuilder for other card games
But morimens builds you deck for you

Ye I would give that example to support my msg
For the reads thing and playing around rng
In ygo math is king 
Calculating brick ratios, putting cards in roles (extender, starter, brick, defensive card)
Fundamentals you pick up on and refine the more you play

The best players will tell you that you don't make a main deck, side deck and extra deck, you just make a deck
Everything should have synergy with itself in a way that works well and plays to the archetype's strengths
People have begun putting extra deck monsters in the side deck a lot more partly because of this and partly because of Ed space

*Goliath dredged the thick swamp, each of his steps sending more droplets into the air as he continued onward nonchalantly.*

"L-L-Lord Goliath! A-are you su-sure this is s-safe!??"

*Daku's cry was loud enough to alert most of the party in the general vicinity of the swamp, even if it was unwanted, as he sheepishly went from dipping his foot into the shallow seaweed and marsh to nimbly retracting it.*

*Goliath initially ignored the petite man, only continuing forward, almost as if telling him to get a move on.*

"L-Lord G-Goliath! Please! There's so-something in the w-water!"

*At this, the large Perishite man sharply turned, looking over his shoulder as he swiveled his torso, only to find Daku rolling on the ground and clutching his foot, causing him to rush over, quickly and heavily stamping in the thick bog*

"You idiot!"

*As the loud, wet slams of the giant's feet grew closer to Daku, he suddenly paused, a puzzled expression on his face as he observed his subordinate.*

"The fuck? You look fine. What are ya crying for?"

"L-L-LORD GOL-GOL-GOLIATH! IT GOT WET! IT'S SOAKED!"

*Daku continued his rolling, only further dirtying his clothes.*

"MY SHOE IS WETTT!"

How does DnD combat work?
Glad it worked out
You roll a 20 sided dice. Add your bonuses to the roll. Compare it to targets defenses. Then roll the damage profile
Gacha
It's turn-based and you roll a dice on your turn and compare it to the enemies AC or the amount of armour they have
To let you know if you hit them or not

Well
there is an item enchantment in dnd like that
Its just Vorpal

When you attack a creature that has at least one head with this weapon and roll a 20 on the attack roll, you cut off one of the creature's heads. The creature dies if it can't survive without the lost head. A creature is immune to this effect if it is immune to slashing damage, doesn't have or need a head, has legendary actions, or the DM decides that the creature is too big for its head to be cut off with this weapon. Such a creature instead takes an extra 6d8 slashing damage from the hit.

embeds.title: 禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！歡迎入學，守密人。喚醒禁忌存在，對抗未知災厄。
embeds.description: 這個世界正在死去。 而你或許是唯一的轉機。 連結與災厄同源的人形武器，來抵抗這場隱密而浩大的危機。 挑戰Roguelite關卡，收集克系美學角色，禁忌卡牌構築手遊《忘卻前夜 Morimens》正式上線！ 歡迎入學，守密人。
